updates.title: Request #37 received and reviewed — here's Aiden's assessment.
updates.body: Thanks for submitting these Jon! Here's where we land on both: (1) Video Aspect Ratio Control — this is very doable. We'll add a toggle to preserve original ratio per platform so your horizontal videos don't get cropped on platforms that don't need it. Queued up for our next build session. (2) Social Auto-Post Integration — love the vision. Connecting Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Gmail for automatic posting is a bigger build that requires API approvals from Meta and TikTok. This is a Phase 2 project — we'll scope it properly and get you a timeline before we start. Stay tuned!

updates.title: Sticky nav, drag-and-drop request uploads, and Action Needed moved to top.
updates.body: Portal gets a major UX upgrade — sticky section nav bar so you can jump to any section instantly, drag-and-drop document upload on the Submit a Request form, and Action Needed From You is now the first thing you see when you log in.

updates.title: 2 Instagram Reels generated and ready for review.
updates.body: Built from your 6798 153rd Ln listing video — "Just Listed" and "Dream Home" angles, both 30 sec vertical format. Download and post, or send feedback!

updates.title: Website mockup ready for review.
updates.body: Full redesign built — navy/gold theme, expertise sections, new construction highlight, lead form, video placeholder. Check it out above!

updates.title: Listing showcase page delivered.
updates.body: Built from your Aryeo media — 30+ photos, luxury video, all 4 floor plans live.

updates.title: Discovery complete.
updates.body: Confirmed Lofty + Northstar MLS setup. Agreed on mockup-first approach before Lofty implementation.
